sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungdam thu zeel-sak un, mi omna ci tengah,
Mihing lungsim omna mihing gal tamna
Tapidaw leii khempeuh lungdam thugensak un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zan hun saupi beita, mi omna citeng ah,
Nitang khammual pan in hong suahkhiat tak ciang in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A kha sung zatui tawh, kumpi te’ To hat pa’n,
khempeuh tung, hong puak, hotkhiat kicing;
Thongpi hawm sung teng ah, zawhna lapi hong ging;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Genzawh loh itna siang! ka leii in bang ci-in,
A mah le A meel tang, sungah ka om theihna’ng;

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Awging van khum dawnah, leng in thawn to sak un;
Tatsat lo itna sung, a bei ngeilo ding la;
